overall.description: A first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through water at night during a storm. The scene features operational navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and depth data, with occasional lightning flashes illuminating the dark surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with electronic consoles

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the water on the port side of the vessel
second lightning flash visible on the port side

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the radar and navigation screens while moving forward through the water

entered.detail: leftmost monitor displaying nautical chart with yellow landmasses and vessel position
center monitor showing circular radar display with sweeping yellow arm
rightmost monitor displaying water column with brown seabed and depth readings
forward deck of the vessel with railings and red navigation lights visible through the bridge windows
metal framing structure surrounding the forward viewing windows of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a ship's bridge at night. The vessel moves steadily through water while lightning occasionally flashes outside the port side windows. Three navigation monitors dominate the upper view, displaying chart, radar, and depth data. The bow of the ship is visible through the forward windows, cutting through dark water with red navigation lights glowing at the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from the bridge of a vessel navigating a dark, storm-tossed sea. It begins with a view dominated by three glowing navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and depth data against the dim interior. As the ship moves forward, the camera looks through the forward windows to reveal the bow cutting through the black water, highlighted by red navigation lights glowing at the railing. The scene is punctuated by sudden flashes of lightning that momentarily illuminate the port side windows and the turbulent environment outside.
